title: Britain's tiniest church holds with ancient holy well just 90 minutes from Manchester
description: In Rhos-on-Sea you'll find a chapel so tiny it holds a maximum of six people, yet this ancient landmark still holds communion services and contains a historic holy well

title: 'Ancient' woodland with private pebble beach up for grabs for £100k
description: Over nine acres of ancient Herefordshire woodland have gone on the market for £100,000.

title: Fossil treasures unearthed in Weymouth exhibition
description: Discover Weymouth’s prehistoric past at the ‘Look What I Found!’ exhibition, running from March 6 to May 31 at the Weymouth Pop-Up Museum, St Thomas Street — showcasing local fossils and the collectors behind them.

title: Is Hot Stone Cooking The Link Between Ancient And Modern Food?
description: From hearths to earth ovens, hot stone cooking threads humanity’s earliest meals to modern kitchens—slow and flavour-forward—revealing how heat, rock and patience shaped cuisines across continents

title: Discover the Hidden Secrets of GUATEMALA’s Tikal Ruins as Ancient Mayan Civilization, Lost Pyramids, and Mysteries Unearthed in the Heart of the Jungle
description: Discover the Hidden Secrets of GUATEMALA’s Tikal Ruins as Ancient Mayan Civilization, Lost Pyramids, and Mysteries Unearthed in the Heart of the JungleExplore the ancient Mayan city of Tikal in Guatemala, a UNESCO heritage site and archaeological treasure revealing complex history and jungle mysteries.The post Discover the Hidden Secrets of GUATEMALA’s Tikal Ruins as Ancient Mayan Civilization, Lost Pyramids, and Mysteries Unearthed in the Heart of the Jungle appeared first on Travel And Tour World.
